rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that the module docstring's claim -- that the finrank lemmas 'combine the normal form with intermediate-field scalar restriction' -- is inaccurate: neither new lemma calls the normal-form results (`exists_add_mul_of_mem_sup_adjoin_sq`/`mem_sup_adjoin_sq`), only scalar restriction is used. Review 2 incorrectly approves the docstrings as 'accurate,' missing this real documentation error that a maintainer would want corrected.
